title: aphyllorchis striata
intro: Aphyllorchis striata, also known as the striped orchid, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the Aphyllorchis genus and is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aphyllorchis striata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Aphyllorchis striata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powder, which are used to treat different health conditions.
